name: claude-code-the-button
description: Answer Claude Code permission prompts from inside VS Code, in the background — the cross-platform companion to The Button floating panel.

commands.title: The Button: Allow Pending Claude Prompt
The Button: Deny Pending Claude Prompt
The Button: Dismiss Pending Claude Prompt
The Button: Install Claude Code Hooks

theButton.eventFile.description: Path to the event file written by hook.py. Leave empty to use ~/.claude/the_button/event.json.
